name: Terry Clarke
abstract: Terence Michael "Terry" Clarke C.M. (born August 20, 1944, Vancouver) is a Canadian jazz drummer.

concerts.label: Jean-Pierre Rampal and Alain Marion, Flute, and John Steele Ritter, Harpsichord/Piano

works.t: Suite for Flute and Jazz Piano Trio

concerts.label: Ann Hampton Callaway: The Diva Takes a Stand

about_quotes.speaker: Jim Hall
about_quotes.evidence: I took Chris Potter over there with me and Terry Clarke... I’ve worked with Don and Terry. That’s how we hooked up.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jim Hall — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Freddie Moore
about_quotes.evidence: Terry Clarke is listed as one of the signers of the award in the interviewer's description, but the interviewee does not mention him or describe any personal interaction.
